name: Nyxshade
description:
Nyxshade is a dragoness with a strong, deep connection to the cosmos. While she looks like a normal Light Fury, apart from the strange markings, eyes and fangs, of course, she's actually a magical alien being born from the death of an ancient star, and she has the ability to infiltrate the dreams of other creatures, even banishing nightmares and turning them into good dreams, ensuring the sleeper sleeps well.

Nyxshade is a celestial dragoness, taking the form of a Light Fury with eyes that have white sclerae, thin, black irises, and big, pale cream-beige pupils that can narrow, widen and dilate like the pupils in a cat's eyes. Her pupils can even glow in the dark. She has two white, sharp fangs protruding from her upper jaw; Vivid magenta eyebrow arcs/facial markings; Crimson-red-magenta blend-colored markings on her nose bridge; a heart-shaped marking on her throat, with a color that gradually transitions from orange to violet

Backstory:

Born from the heart of a dying star, Nyxshade is a celestial dragon with a deep connection to the night sky. Legends say that she was once a spirit of the void, given form by an ancient lunar deity who sought to create balance between darkness and light. Her bioluminescent markings glow faintly under the moonlight, guiding lost souls through the shadows.

Despite her eerie, ghostly presence, Nyxshade is a guardian of dreams, protecting those who slumber from nightmares and unseen horrors. She rarely speaks, but her silent watchfulness is enough to strike both awe and fear into those who glimpse her. Her fangs hold the essence of twilight, and a single bite can either grant eternal peace or pull someone into an endless slumber, where their dreams become reality and their reality fades into dreams.

Name: Nyxshade

Species: Light Fury (cosmic/stellar variant)

Role/Concept: Dream-Guarding Dragon, celestial guardian born from a dying star

Gender: Female

Sexuality: Pansexual

Age: 2,300 years old EXACTLY (as of March 2, 2026 (happy birthday, Nyxshade!!!!)

Birthdate: March 2, 274 BC

Origin Star: O-type main-sequence star → red hypergiant → collapsed in a hypernova.

  • Birth Moment: Coalesced from the stellar core’s last heartbeat, forged by a lunar deity.

Birthday: March 2

Zodiac: Pisces ♓ — intuitive, mystical, dual-natured, guardian of dream and shadow.

Height: 1.75 meters (standing on all fours)

Body length: 6.7 meters (22 feet)

Wingspan: 12.8 meters (42 feet)

Mass: 725.74 kilograms (1,600 pounds)

Eyes (Color): white sclerae with pale cream-beige pupils.

Base form: Light Fury (resembles a cross between a gecko, axolotl, and panther).

  • Body: Sleek, aerodynamic, covered in tiny, white pearlescent scales.

  • Accents: Pink nose and wing stripes; light blue belly, underwings, and tail flukes.

  • Wings: Large, bat-like, rounded tips; tail with several pairs of flukes for maneuvering.

  • Head: Prominent snout like a rhinarium; four ear-like nubs on back of head; big, pink tongue with chubby fork at tip.

  • Paws: Catlike, with stubby fingers and claws; rounded spines/fins on forepaws.

Unique Traits & Body Color Pallete (including color hexes):

Main colors:

  • White: The base color of the scales is white (#FFFFFF), typical for Light Furies, which helps them blend into the sky and clouds.
